name: Create a work4all incoming invoice from email attachments using AI

parameters.content:
## Create a work4all incoming invoice from email attachments using AI

This **sub-workflow** is called by a parent workflow with one email item whose attachments are passed as binary data. The attachments are read by AI, structured invoice data is extracted, and the **work4all** node books the incoming invoice with the original files attached.

### How it works
1. Keeps only emails that carry a readable PDF / XML / JSON attachment.
2. Extracts invoice data in one of two modes (**Extraction config**):
   - **`backend`** (default) — work4all AI backend, uses the **work4all** credential.
   - **`llm`** — your own **OpenAI-compatible** model (*Call LLM*).
3. Normalises the result, books the incoming invoice and attaches the files.

### Setup
1. Add your **work4all** credential.
2. Call this workflow from a parent that supplies the email + attachments.

### Customization
- **Extraction mode** — default is `backend` (work4all AI). For your own model, set **Extraction config** to `llm` and add an **OpenAI-compatible** credential on *Call LLM*.
- Switch provider/model in *Call LLM* and the `MODEL` constant in *Build LLM messages* (must support **PDF / file input**).

Requires a work4all account and the verified `n8n-nodes-work4all` node.

## 1 · Input & validation
Receives the email from the parent workflow and keeps only items that carry a readable PDF / XML / JSON attachment.

## 3 · Extract invoice data
Both modes read the attachments and return the same structured invoice JSON — via the work4all AI backend or an OpenAI-compatible LLM (*Build LLM messages* → *Call LLM*).

## 5 · Book in work4all
Normalises currency and dates, creates the incoming invoice in work4all and attaches the original files.

## 2 · Choose extraction mode
Set `extractionMode` in **Extraction config**: `backend` (work4all AI backend) or `llm` (your own OpenAI-compatible model).

## 4 · Parse & check
Normalises either output into the same shape and checks whether an invoice was found. If not, booking is skipped.

## 6 · No invoice
Items without a usable invoice end here and return a simple skipped result.
